title: MasterClass Pepper Mill or Salt Grinder with Interchangeable Cap, Black, 17cm
features: WITH A CLASSIC CAPSTAN SHAPE and dramatic black finish, this pepper / salt mill is an impressive addition to a kitchen or dinner table
SALT GRINDER OR PEPPER MILL: fill with salt or pepper - it works with either, and comes with interchangeable 'S' and 'P' engraved caps
RUST-FREE CERAMIC GRINDER: this salt and pepper grinder effortlessly mills coarse salt or hard pepper for years, without wear or rust
MIX AND MATCH: explore the MasterClass salt and pepper grinder collection for a range of mills in multiple colours and sizes
description: From the manufacturer Cook with Confidence Experiment, create and accomplish: with outstanding design, premium quality and a passion for food, MasterClass helps you cook with confidence. MasterClass Medium Capstan-Shaped Black Pepper Grinder / Salt Mill (17 cm) More Information: Includes 1 x salt or pepper grinder, 1 x 'S' engraved cap and 1 x 'P' engraved cap Height: 17 cm (6½ inches) Diameter: 6 cm (2½ inches) Wipes clean Choose Salt or Pepper You can fill this mill with coarse rock salt or hard peppercorns: it'll work with either. Simply switch between the interchangeable 'S' and 'P' engraved caps to match the ingredient inside. A Dash of Flavour, Served with Style With its dramatic black finish and traditional capstan shape, this medium-sized MasterClass salt or pepper mill takes a classic design and gives it a statement-making look. At 17 cm (6½ inches) tall, it’s eye-catching and practical. It looks great on your dining table or in your kitchen, and stores away easily too. It's fitted with a clever ceramic grinding mechanism that’s extra efficient and hardwearing. So it will last for years, as well as looking great. Ceramic Mechanism for Long-Lasting Performance Ceramic is a fantastic material for grinding. It’s very hardwearing, and can withstand years of regular use. And, because it’s non-metallic, it will never rust. It’s also extremely versatile, providing an efficient and steady grind with all kinds of salt or pepper – from coarse rock salt, to hardpepper corns, to sea salt and more. Mix and Match From Many Colours and Sizes The MasterClass salt and pepper collection includes lots of variations on this eye-catching and versatile salt / pepper grinder, with a range of colours and sizes available. Why not explore the range further, and choose a selection of mills to suit your personality and your home? Colours range from ombré-tinted green and bold red to classic black and white, so you can create a rainbow of colour in your kitchen, or opt for a chic, monochrome theme. It’s up to you. At MasterClass, We Love Food Food is passion. Food is special. Food is everyday. Trust MasterClass to elevate your culinary experience - whether you're feeding a family, entertaining to impress, or striving to become the best home chef you can be. Established in 1850, MasterClass provides an extensive range of expert kitchen tools and gadgets, cookware and its acclaimed bakeware collection. Every product is designed with one simple goal in mind: to make great food accessible to anyone who cooks or wants to cook.
